title: Flutter Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced Flutter Developer to build cross-platform mobile applications. You will be responsible for creating high-performance UI components, integrating RESTful APIs, and maintaining code quality.

title: Python Backend Developer
description: Join our AI backend team. You will design and implement REST APIs using FastAPI, integrate Machine Learning models (TF-IDF, NLP), and optimize database queries. Strong Python skills are required.

title: Frontend React Engineer
description: Build modern web applications using React.js and Next.js. You should understand responsive design, state management with Redux, and modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind.

title: Data Scientist
description: We need a Data Scientist to analyze complex datasets, build recommendation systems, and apply statistical techniques. Experience with Python, Pandas, and Scikit-Learn is essential.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: Develop core banking systems using Java and Spring Boot. You must have strong knowledge of microservices architecture, PostgreSQL, and system security.

title: Fullstack Web Developer
description: Looking for a Fullstack Developer proficient in Node.js and React. You will own features end-to-end, from database design (MongoDB) to frontend UI components.

title: Mobile App Developer (iOS/Android)
description: Develop native and cross-platform applications. Experience with Swift for iOS or Kotlin for Android is a plus, but Flutter/React Native is acceptable.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage our cloud infrastructure on AWS. Strong experience with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure as code (Terraform).
